rule_proof_bucket.description: Tagged rule-competition bucket (USDT sum of open stakes for BTC-0.1-R*). Raised vs 1/3@10k to allow more scale-ins/samples on demo. Freqtrade: still one open position per pair — more data = faster R03 TP + looser gates + more DCA fills, not parallel BTC legs.

tuning._dataflow: Nautilus → finance_agent/btc_specialist/data → channel_training → prediction_agent/training_channel_output.json (R01). SYGNIF_PROFILE=btc_trend + Sygnif informative merge → RSI_14_1h/4h, EMA_200_1h, ADX_14 on 5m (R02). Edit thresholds here; git-tracked. See letscrash/RULE_AND_DATA_FLOW_LOOP.md §3.
tuning._sampling_note: BTC-only bot: one Freqtrade position per pair. To collect more tagged trades, relax R01/R02/R03 gates, raise bucket cap, add DCA fills, shorten R03 TP — not max_open_trades on a single symbol.

r01_governance.notes: enabled=false disables bearish governance entirely (demo only). Higher p_down_min_pct → bearish stack triggers less often → more R02/R03 entries + fewer confirm blocks on BTC-0.1-R*. 96.5 vs 94: materially fewer stacked hours.

r02_regime.notes: HTF bull gate for BTC-0.1-R02 (stricter than parent btc_trend_long_row). Lower → more R02 bars under btc_trend profile; tighten for production.

r03_pullback.notes: Sleeve only when flat after parent+R02 logic. Higher rsi_prior_3bars_max / adx_max, lower rsi_now_min → more R03 arms (still last-bar only).

r03_scalp.notes: Lower tp / rsi_overbought → custom_exit R03 paths fire more often (scalp_take / overbought).

slot_caps.notes: Per-tag concurrent open trades (multi-pair lists); on single-pair BTC only one position exists — caps apply when whitelist grows.

dca.notes: More scale-in tranches, slightly earlier vs parent -3% (more entry events in logs on one position).

predict_loop_resource.notes: SYGNIF predict-protocol loop: skip run_live_fit when MemAvailable is low or loadavg_1m is high; sleep cooldown_sec to avoid CPU spin. Disable: SYGNIF_PREDICT_RESOURCE_GUARD=0 or set enabled false here.

entry_prediction.notes: When training+runner = bearish (r01_training_runner_bearish), block longs on BTC-0.1-R* and also_gate_tags. Legacy blocks (R01/strong_ta/orb_long/sygnif_s long) stay on even if enabled=false.

BTC-0.1-R01.notes: sl_doom: same units as Sygnif doom (÷ leverage for futures → custom_stoploss). tp_profit_pct: ROI fraction, × leverage like R03 scalp; lower → exit_btc01_r01_tp more often.

BTC-0.1-R02.notes: Slightly lower TP vs 0.04 → more exit_btc01_r02_tp events for journal/sampling.

tp_sl.notes: Every open carries an exchange SL via stoploss_on_exchange + custom_stoploss; TP exits via custom_exit (market per order_types).
